zx.summary: JavaScript/TypeScript tool for writing scripts with better error handling and syntax. Install when you want a cleaner scripting experience than plain Node.js scripts.

zxc.summary: High-performance asymmetric lossless compression library. Install if you're developing applications requiring specialized compression algorithms.

zxcc.summary: CP/M 2/3 emulator enabling cross-compilation and CP/M tool execution on Unix-like systems. Install if you need to run or develop legacy CP/M software.

zxing-cpp.summary: Multi-format barcode and QR code detection library in C++. Install when you need to read or generate barcodes in your application.

zxpinstaller.summary: Adobe's extension installer for managing .zxp package files. Install if you need to install Adobe plugins and extensions.

zy-player.summary: Video player for accessing and playing online video resources. Install as a media player for streaming or local video content.

zycore-c.summary: Core utility library for C projects providing common data structures and functions. Install as a dependency for other Zyan-based tools.

zydis.summary: Fast x86/x86-64 instruction disassembler library. Install when you need to analyze or reverse-engineer machine code programmatically.

zyre.summary: Local area clustering framework for peer-to-peer applications over ZeroMQ. Install when building distributed applications that need LAN-based node discovery.

zzuf.summary: Transparent input fuzzer for testing application robustness. Install when you want to fuzz test programs with random data corruption.

zzz.summary: Command-line utility to put your Mac to sleep programmatically. Install when you need to automate sleep scheduling or integrate sleep commands into scripts.
